title: cliffortia propinqua
intro: Cliffortia propinqua, also known as the 'dune cliffortia', is a succulent plant species native to South Africa. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which can help to protect against cell damage and promote overall health. Cliffortia propinqua can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a tea or tincture, and its leaves can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
